name: Canton Disco

identity.notes: Official site and linked Toast identify the Navy Yard DC restaurant at 1025 1st St SE; no other Canton Disco location was merged.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

products.name: Wok Charred String Beans & Snow Peas

notes: Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Toast identifies 1025 1st Street Southeast and publishes current food, desserts, sauces, and nonalcoholic beverages. Named ingredients include sesame, soy, shrimp, scallop, milk, egg, wheat, walnut, almond, and coconut.
Toast brunch surface publishes congee, brunch food, teas, soft drinks, and the frozen audit products.
Official homepage identifies Canton Disco and 1025 1st St SE, Washington, DC 20003, and links order and menu surfaces.
Official menu page links the current menu/order vendor and a catering surface.
Older menu PDF says items and prices change and directs users to Toast for the most current menu; retained as noncurrent document evidence.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: recompute Ingredient Intelligence after direct finalization
